goal: 给 Catty judge-record CLI 接入四格反馈输入

summary.title: 接入 judge 反馈 CLI
summary.what: 给 Catty v0 的 judge-record CLI 增加四格反馈输入参数：--feedback-correct、--feedback-resonance、--feedback-helpful、--feedback-nudge 和可选 --feedback-note。CLI 现在会把这些反馈传入既有 judge 写回路径，并随 judgement 一起持久化到 catty_predictions.feedback_json；同时新增 CLI 行为测试和 README 用法。
summary.why: v0 需要用“对不对、像不像我、有没有帮助、有没有被带着走”校准 independent judge 和 visible helpfulness。runtime、store 和 report 已经支持 CattyFeedback，但真实 dogfood 操作只能从 CLI 进入，缺少 CLI 参数会让反馈入口停留在内部 API，无法形成可用的 v0 校准信号。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty judge-record CLI 接入四格反馈输入

decisions.chose: 直接接入 judge-record CLI，并复用现有 judgeRecordedPrediction / SqliteCattyStore feedback 路径。
decisions.rationale: 反馈是 judgement 校准信号，和 actualTrail 对照同一条 prediction 写回最容易审计；不需要新增表、命令或调度层。

decisions.point: 反馈参数是否允许部分填写
decisions.chose: 只要出现任何 feedback 参数，就要求四个 boolean 维度全部提供，note 仍为可选。
decisions.rationale: v0 的反馈口径就是四格反馈；允许部分字段会让 visible helpfulness / nudge 统计产生含义不完整的样本。

decisions.chose: 保持既有 --write 显式写入边界，且不新增模型调用、heartbeat 接入、user memory 写入或 canary 状态变化。
decisions.rationale: 本轮只补齐人工反馈输入，不改变 judge、memory admission 或 dogfood 推进协议。

decisions.chose: 将 int_22f3a69f 视为前序手动打分入口，本轮是其 CLI 反馈输入补齐；其他 overlap 是同一 catty 分支上的顺序诊断/报告增强。
decisions.rationale: 本轮只触碰 judge-record CLI、其测试和 src/catty README，不修改前序采样、候选、canary、ops 或 UI 语义。

rejected.reason: 会把用户反馈和实际 judgement / actualTrail 写回拆开，增加针对同一 prediction 的漂移和重复写入风险。

rejected.alternative: 允许只写部分反馈字段
rejected.reason: 四格反馈是 v0 校准口径；部分字段会让 report 的 negativeFeedback / nudgeReports 难以解释。

review_notes: TDD：先新增 CLI 行为测试，修正测试 fixture 后红测失败于 persisted feedback 为 undefined；实现 CLI 参数解析后绿。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/judge-record.test.ts，2 pass。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，80 pass。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 均无输出。
live dogfood-health 仍 blocked：no_user_prior_candidates / repeated-context；本轮未写 prediction、user memory、canary，也未调用模型。
live ops status：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 显示 heartbeat ok、launchd lastExitCode=0、diagnostics.needsAttention=false。
既有无关 CLAUDE.md 仍为 unstaged dirty，未 stage、未提交、未修改。

architectural_claims: judge-record CLI now exposes the existing CattyFeedback path instead of introducing a parallel feedback storage surface.
Feedback remains tied to a judged PredictionRecord and is persisted through the existing catty_predictions.feedback_json field.
The change does not alter prediction sampling, judge rubric semantics, memory candidate generation, canary flow, accepted-memory writing, heartbeat behavior, or model-call boundaries.
behavioral_changes: When feedback flags are provided with --write, the resulting PredictionRecord persists CattyFeedback alongside judgement and actualTrail.
If any feedback flag is present, all four boolean feedback dimensions are required; invalid boolean values fail before judgement writeback.
src/catty/README.md documents the four-grid feedback CLI usage.

api_changes.signature: bun src/catty/judge-record.ts --feedback-correct BOOL --feedback-resonance BOOL --feedback-helpful BOOL --feedback-nudge BOOL [--feedback-note TEXT]

security_implications: No secrets, API keys, cookies, or ~/.agents/memory/config.json were read or emitted.
No model provider calls were added.
No user memory, catty_memory_audit rows, canary state, apply receipts, heartbeat config, or launchd config are written by this change.
migration_notes: No SQLite migration is required; catty_predictions.feedback_json already existed and is reused.
Existing judge-record CLI calls without feedback flags continue to work.
